pages.text: $(o)"A real soldier bleeds; a paper soldier doesn't — he just gets folded again."$()$(br2)Signature work of the Illusion School. Sixteen invincible silent paper soldiers — chicken-shaped, by stubborn tradition.

pages.title: Effect
pages.text: Spawn $(l)16$() invincible silent chickens around the core (radius 2.5).$(br2)They take no damage, make no noise, and serve as $(l)aggro decoys$(). Tagged $(l)transcend_decoy$() for cross-mod recognition.$(br2)Cost: $(l)3600$() mana.

pages.title: Tactics
pages.text: Mass aggro distraction — let 16 invincible birds take all the heat while you nuke from the back.$(br2)Bosses with player-priority targeting may ignore them.$(br2)Recommended: $(l)Tier 3 Convergence$() or above.
